title: FLOSS Weekly 454: OpenBenchmarking.org
summary:
Michael Larabel is the founder of Phoronix.com and lead developer of the Phoronix Test Suite / Phoromatic / OpenBenchmarking.org open-source benchmarking software. Michael's coverage pays keen interest, news coverage, and benchmarking of the Linux kernel, Mesa, Wayland, X.Org, GCC, and LLVM, among other performance-sensitive projects.
OpenBenchmarking.org provides effective collaboration tools for sharing results and efficiently comparing multiple test result sets.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
